import { Component, inject, OnInit } from '@angular/core'; import { RouterOutlet, RouterLink, RouterLinkActive, Router } from '@angular/router'; import { CommonModule, NgIf, NgFor } from '@angular/common'; // 🚀 AJOUT : Importation de votre nouveau composant de notifications autonome import { NotificationCenterComponent } from '../../../shared/components/notification-center/notification-center.component'; @Component({ selector: 'app-recruiter-layout', standalone: true, // 🚀 AJOUT : Déclaration du composant dans les imports requis par le template HTML imports: [RouterOutlet, RouterLink, RouterLinkActive, CommonModule, NgIf, NgFor, NotificationCenterComponent], templateUrl: './recruiter-layout.component.html', styleUrls: ['./recruiter-layout.component.css'] }) export class RecruiterLayoutComponent implements OnInit { private router = inject(Router); recruiterName = 'Recruteur'; ngOnInit() { const storedName = localStorage.getItem('name'); if (storedName) { this.recruiterName = storedName; } } onLogout() { localStorage.clear(); this.router.navigate(['/login']); } }
